data.biography:
Angelica Lee Sin-Jie (Chinese: 李心潔; pinyin: Lee Sin-je; born 23 January 1976 in Kedah, Malaysia) is a Malaysian Chinese film actress and pop singer.  She started her career in singing and later moved on to acting in Taiwan and Hong Kong. Lee starred in The Eye, the hit Asian horror film by the Pang Brothers, winning her the Golden Horse Award for Best Actress, Best Actress at the Hong Kong Film Festival and a Hong Kong Golden Bauhinia Award. She is among the very few Asian artists to be awarded as Berlin Film Festival Best Newcomer Awards in 2001 for her role in Betelnut Beauty. Lee has also starred in the films 20 30 40 (where she co-starred with the person who discovered her, Sylvia Chang Ai Jia), and Koma. She worked with the Pangs again on Re-cycle, which was screened at the 2006 Cannes Film Festival.

She is married to director Oxide Pang Shun.
data.name: Angelica Lee Sin-Jie

data.biography:
李心洁，签约于台湾滚石唱片公司，之后曾参与多个广告片的演出。1996年，李心洁发表了首张国语专辑《同一个星空下》。2000年9月, 推出了第五张个人专辑《爱像大海》。除了歌唱以外，她还努力于写词，写书及画画。2000年正式开展她在电影圈的演艺事业，首部担任女主角的的电影《爱你爱我》,夺得2001年柏林电影节的最佳新演员奖。第三部担任女主角的电影《鬼眼》夺得第三十九届台湾金马奖最佳女主角奖(2002年)，第八届香港金紫荆奖的最佳女主角奖(2003)、第二十二届香港电影金像奖最佳女主角(2003)及中国大陆第六届华语电影传媒大奖最佳女主角(2003)。

除此以外，李心洁亦作舞台上的尝试，98年圣诞节，演出了台湾由果实文教基金会的歌舞剧\"爱滋梦游仙境\"。2002年于香港为邓丽君基金会演出纪念邓丽君小姐之音乐剧\"但愿人长久\",担任少年时期的邓丽君。
data.name: 李心洁

data.biography:
李心潔，簽約於台灣滾石唱片公司，之後曾參與多個廣告片的演出。1996 年，李心潔發表了首張國語專輯《同一個星空下》。2000 年 9 月, 推出了第五張個人專輯《愛像大海》。除了歌唱以外，她還努力於寫詞，寫書及畫畫。2000 年正式開展她在電影圈的演藝事業，首部擔任女主角的的電影《愛你愛我》, 奪得 2001 年柏林電影節的最佳新演員獎。第三部擔任女主角的電影《鬼眼》奪得第三十九屆台灣金馬獎最佳女主角獎 (2002 年)，第八屆香港金紫荊獎的最佳女主角獎 (2003)、第二十二屆香港電影金像獎最佳女主角 (2003) 及中國大陸第六屆華語電影傳媒大獎最佳女主角 (2003)。

除此以外，李心潔亦作舞台上的嘗試，98 年聖誕節，演出了台灣由果實文教基金會的歌舞劇\"愛滋夢遊仙境\"。2002 年於香港為鄧麗君基金會演出紀念鄧麗君小姐之音樂劇\"但願人長久\", 擔任少年時期的鄧麗君。
data.name: 李心潔

data.biography:
สาริน รณเกียรติ ชื่อเล่น อิน โดยชื่อ "สาริน" คุณแม่ตั้งให้ มีความหมายว่า “ผู้เป็นใจกลางของทุกสิ่ง” เกิดเมื่อวันที่ 4 มกราคม พ.ศ. 2538 ที่กรุงเทพมหานคร เป็นลูกชายคนกลางของครอบครัว มีพี่สาว 1 คน และน้องสาว 1 คน ครอบครัวทำธุรกิจด้านอสังหาริมทรัพย์ จบการศึกษาระดับมัธยมศึกษาที่โรงเรียนกรุงเทพคริสเตียนวิทยาลัย ระดับอุดมศึกษาที่คณะสถาปัตยกรรมศาสตร์ สาขาออกแบบสถาปัตยกรรม (หลักสูตรนานาชาติ) หรือ International Program in Design & Architecture (INDA) จุฬาลงกรณ์มหาวิทยาลัย เกียรตินิยมอันดับ 2 อินเริ่มต้นจากการเป็นที่รู้จักในฐานะคิวต์บอยหนุ่มสุดฮ็อตจากสถาปัตย์จุฬาฯ หลังจากเรียนจบ ประกอบอาชีพสถาปนิก ส่วนในวงการบันเทิงเริ่มมาจากการเป็นดีเจของ Get 102.5 โดยการชักชวนของรุ่นพี่ที่รู้จัก และก้าวเข้ามาเป็นนักแสดงกับทางช่อง 3 กับผลงานละครเรื่องแรกคือ ดวงใจในไฟหนาว

ระหว่างศึกษาต่อที่เกาหลี ได้ทำการทดสอบบทการแสดง จนในปี 2562 สารินได้รับโอกาสร่วมแสดงในละครซีรีส์ชุด ลูกผู้ชาย ตอน ภูผา ในบทบาท "ภูผา" ซึ่งเป็นพระเอกเรื่องแรก จากนั้นรับบทเป็น "พ่อเพิ่ม" ในละครเรื่อง ทองเอก หมอยา ท่าโฉลง และรับบทร้ายเรื่องแรกในเรื่อง ฟากฟ้าคีรีดาว
data.name: สาริน รณเกียรติ

data.biography:
Ryan Christian Kwanten (born 28 November 1976) is an Australian actor and producer. He played Vinnie Patterson from 1997 to 2002 in the Australian soap opera Home and Away. After his stint ended, he joined the American teen drama series Summerland, portraying Jay Robertson. From 2008 to 2014, he played Jason Stackhouse in True Blood. From 2018 to 2019 he produced and starred in the crime drama series The Oath as Steve Hammond. In 2021, he starred in season one of the horror drama anthology series Them as George Bell. In 2022, he portrayed Thomas Weylin in Kindred, a series adaptation based on Octavia E. Butler's celebrated 1979 novel of the same name.

data.biography:
Ryan Christian Kwanten (* 28. November 1976 in Sydney, New South Wales) ist ein australischer Schauspieler.

Ryan Kwanten wurde in Sydney, im australischen Bundesstaat New South Wales geboren. Seine Schauspielkarriere begann er mehr oder weniger zufällig. Einer seiner Brüder sprach bei einer Agentur vor. Als Kwanten aus Ungeduld das Auto verließ und ebenfalls die Agentur betrat, baten ihn die Agenten vorzusprechen. Sein Bruder wurde nicht genommen, aber Kwanten selbst. Seine ersten Auftritte hatte er in den Fernsehserien A Country Practice und Spellbinder – Im Land des Drachenkaisers. 1997 wurde er in die Hauptbesetzung der australischen Seifenoper Home and Away aufgenommen und spielte dort den Rettungsschwimmer Vinnie Patterson. Kwanten war in der Show einige Jahre zu sehen und wurde so zum Sexsymbol. Er entschied sich 2002 die Serie zu verlassen – kurz nachdem seine Rolle geheiratet hatte und Vater geworden war. Zuvor war er bereits im Alter von 15 Jahren in einer Nebenrolle in der Serie zu sehen. Die Produzenten waren so begeistert von ihm, dass sie ihm später eben jene Hauptrolle anboten.

Kwanten zog in die USA und wurde dort für die Fernsehserie Summerland Beach gecastet. Die Serie lief für zwei Jahre von 2004 bis 2005. Er war zudem 2006 im Film Flicka – Freiheit. Freundschaft. Abenteuer. neben Maria Bello, Alison Lohman und Tim McGraw zu sehen. Außerdem spielte er die Hauptrolle im Horrorfilm Dead Silence sowie die Rolle des triebhaften Bruders von Hauptdarstellerin Anna Paquin in der Fernsehserie True Blood. In seiner drehfreien Zeit zwischen der zweiten und dritten Staffel von True Blood flog Kwanten zurück in seine Heimat Australien, um den Film Red Hill zu drehen.

Ryan Christian Kwanten（1976年11月28日-），澳大利亚演员、制片人。1997 年至 2002 年，他在澳大利亚肥皂剧《Home and Away》中扮演 Vinnie Patterson。任期结束后，他加入了美国青少年电视剧《夏日乐园》，饰演杰伊·罗伯逊。从2008年到2014年，他在《真爱如血》中饰演杰森·斯塔克豪斯。从 2018 年到 2019 年，他制作并主演了犯罪剧集《誓言》，饰演史蒂夫·哈蒙德。2021年，他出演了恐怖剧集《他们》第一季，饰演乔治·贝尔。2022 年，他在 Kindred 中饰演托马斯·韦林，该剧改编自奥克塔维亚·巴特勒 1979 年的著名同名小说。
data.name: 瑞恩·柯万腾

data.biography: Celeste O'Connor (born December 2, 1998) is a Kenyan-born American actor. They were born in Nairobi, Kenya and raised in Baltimore, MD for the majority of their life. They live in Baltimore with their mother, father, and younger brother. They attend college, studying Public Health, Islamic Studies and Pre-Medicine. Celeste began their career as an actor with their first independent film, Wetlands (2017).
data.name: Celeste O'Connor

data.biography:
Celeste O'Connor nait le 2 décembre 1998 à Nairobi au Kenya, d'un père américain et d'une mère kényane. Elle grandit ensuite à Baltimore2. Elle fréquente l'école Notre Dame Preparatory de Towson et étudie le violon au conservatoire de l'Institut Peabody. Celeste O'Connor intègre ensuite l'université Johns-Hopkins où elle étudie notamment la santé publique3. Elle pratique par ailleurs des études islamiques.

Celeste O'Connor fait ses débuts au cinéma avec le long métrage Wetlands d'Emanuele Della Valle, sorti en 2017. Elle joue ensuite une version jeune du personnage de Gugu Mbatha-Raw dans le film Mon âme sœur (Irreplaceable You) de Stephanie Laing, diffusé en 2018 sur Netflix.

En 2019, elle tient l'un des rôles principaux du film Selah et les Spades (en) (Selah and the Spades) de Tayarisha Poe. Anagha Komaragiri du journal Daily Californian plébiscite sa performance et parle d'une « présence subtile » et « pensive ». Elle rejoint ensuite la distribution du blockbuster SOS Fantômes : L'Héritage, 4e opus de la franchise SOS Fantômes. Le film sort fin 2021.

En 2022, elle joue dans le film romantique The In Between. L'année suivante, elle est présente dans A Good Person de Zach Braff. En 2024, elle sera à l'affiche de Madame Web, un film du Sony's Spider-Man Universe dans lequel elle incarne l'une des versions de Spider-Woman. Elle reprendra également son rôle de Lucky Domingo dans SOS Fantômes : La Menace de glace.

data.biography:
Wi Ha-jun (위하준), doğum adıyla Wi Hyun-yi, 5 Ağustos 1991 tarihinde Güney Kore'nin Güney Jeolla iline bağlı Wando ilçesindeki Soan adasında dünyaya gelmiştir. Ailesinin deniz kulağı çiftliğinde büyüyen Wi, Sungkyul Üniversitesi'nde Tiyatro ve Film bölümünde eğitim alarak oyunculuk temellerini attı. Kariyerine 2012 yılında kısa filmlerle başladı.

Kariyerinin ilk yıllarında "Coin Locker Girl" (2015) gibi filmlerde ve "My Golden Life" (2017) gibi televizyon dizilerinde yardımcı rollerde yer aldı. 2018 yılı onun için bir çıkış yılı oldu. "Something in the Rain" (2018) adlı popüler romantik dizide Son Ye-jin'in erkek kardeşini canlandırarak daha geniş kitlelerce tanındı. Aynı yıl, Kore korku sinemasının önemli örneklerinden biri olan ve "found footage" (buluntu film) tekniğiyle çekilen "Gonjiam: Haunted Asylum" (2018) filmindeki başrolüyle dikkatleri üzerine çekti. Bu film, ona bir karakter oyuncusu olarak yeteneğini gösterme fırsatı verdi.

2019'da "Romance Is a Bonus Book" ve 2020'de "18 Again" gibi popüler dizilerdeki rolleriyle istikrarlı bir şekilde kariyerini inşa etmeye devam etti. 2021 yılında, işitme engelli bir kadını hedef alan bir seri katili canlandırdığı gerilim filmi "Midnight"taki performansıyla oyunculuk yelpazesinin ne kadar geniş olduğunu kanıtladı. Bu rol, onun hem fiziksel hem de psikolojik olarak zorlayıcı karakterleri ne kadar başarıyla canlandırabildiğini gösterdi.

Ancak Wi Ha-jun'u küresel bir yıldıza dönüştüren ve ona uluslararası alanda büyük bir şöhret kazandıran proje, 2021 yılında yayınlanan Netflix'in rekorlar kıran dizisi "Squid Game" oldu. Dizide, kayıp kardeşini bulmak için ölümcül oyunların düzenlendiği tesise gizlice sızan polis memuru Hwang Jun-ho karakterine hayat verdi. Karakterin cesur ve kararlı duruşuyla dünya çapında milyonlarca izleyicinin beğenisini kazandı ve dizinin en sevilen karakterlerinden biri haline geldi.

"Squid Game"in getirdiği uluslararası başarının ardından, Lee Dong-wook ile başrolü paylaştığı aksiyon-komedi dizisi "Bad and Crazy" (2021), eleştirmenlerce beğenilen "Little Women" (2022) ve Ji Chang-wook ile birlikte rol aldığı suç-aksiyon dizisi "The Worst of Evil" (2023) gibi yüksek profilli projelerde yer alarak başrol oyuncusu olarak statüsünü sağlamlaştırdı.

data.biography: Sae Bom es una reconocida actriz surcoreana nacida el 7 de junio de 1985 en Seúl. Comenzó su carrera en la industria del entretenimiento en 2007 cuando debutó como actriz en la serie de televisión "Coffee Prince".  Su talento y carisma rápidamente la llevaron a ser una de las actrices más solicitadas en la televisión y el cine de Corea del Sur. A lo largo de su carrera, ha participado en numerosas series de televisión y películas de gran éxito, consolidándose como una de las grandes estrellas de la industria del entretenimiento en su país. Su actuación en dramas como "My Love from the Star" y "Touch Your Heart" la ha hecho ganar numerosos premios y el reconocimiento del público y la crítica.  Además de su trabajo en la actuación, Sae Bom también ha incursionado con éxito en el mundo de la moda y la música, destacándose como una artista multifacética y talentosa. Sin duda, Sae Bom es una de las figuras más importantes y queridas de la industria del entretenimiento en Corea del Sur.

data.overview: Li Ca Hành kể về mối tình khắc cốt ghi tâm của tướng quân Trình Xử Mặc (Hứa Khải thủ vai) và nữ quan Phó Nhu (Lý Nhất Đồng đóng). Phó Nhu là một tiểu thư xinh đẹp, tài giỏi rất am hiểu cầm kỳ thi họa, giỏi thêu thùa và may vá. Mọi chuyện yên lành cho tới khi nàng bị tuyển vào cung để làm người hầu. Tại đây nàng lọt vào tầm mắt của công tử nhà tướng quân chỉ biết ăn chơi lêu lổng. Vì quá yêu Phó Nhu mà Trình Xử Mặc quyết tâm thay đổi bản thân để chiếm trọn tình cảm của nàng. Cả hai tạo nên chuyện tình vừa ngọt ngào, hài hước vừa nhiều thử thách và tất nhiên họ cũng bị cuốn vào những âm mưu mô thủ đoạn, nguy hiểm luôn kề trong cuộc tranh đấu chốn cung đình.

data.name: Hồ Sơ Trinh Sát
data.overview: Hồ Sơ Trinh Sát (tiếng Hoa: 刑事偵緝檔案, tiếng Anh: Detective Investigation Files) là bộ phim đầu tiên về đề tài phá án hình sự của Hồng Kông do giám chế Phan Gia Đức sản xuất, mở đường cho thể loại phim hành động cảnh sát quen thuộc của Hồng Kông sau này. Phim nằm trong top 10 phim kinh điển của truyền hình Hồng Kông qua mọi thời đại. Hồ sơ trinh sát đã khắc họa góc nhìn chân thật của cảnh sát Hồng Kông qua những vụ án ly kỳ, hấp dẫn và có phần rùng rợn. Bộ phim khi được phát sóng đã tạo nên cơn sốt với lượng rating kỷ lục. Thành công của bộ phim đã đưa tên tuổi của Đào Đại Vũ và Quách Khả Doanh trở thành tiểu sinh và hoa đán hàng đầu của TVB của thập niên 90. Nhân vật Trương Đại Dũng của Đào Đại Vũ cũng nằm trong top 100 nhân vật kinh điển nhất của truyền hình Hồng Kông. Bên cạnh đó, Đào Đại Vũ và Quách Khả Doanh còn liên tiếp nhận được giải Cặp đôi được yêu thích nhất 4 năm liền từ 1996-1999.

data.biography:
Die in Miami geborene Williams wuchs in Tennessee auf. Sie begann in der High School aufzutreten und zog später nach New York City, um als Model zu arbeiten. In New York studierte Williams Schauspiel im Larry Moss Studio und zog später nach Los Angeles, als sie anfing, in Episoden von Fernsehserien wie Mord ist ihr Hobby, Dream On und Eine schrecklich nette Familie mitzuwirken. Williams hatte auch Nebenrollen in den Filmen Beverly Hills Cop III (1994), Die Maske (1994) und Apollo 13 (1995).

Ab 2008 begann Williams mit der Produktion von Independent-Filmen. Sie spielte unter anderem die Hauptrollen in Skeletons in the Desert (2008), Raven (2010) und Mysteria (2011). Die US-Amerikanerin produzierte selbst und spielte neben Samantha Morton in dem Horrorfilm The Harvest von 2013 sowie in dem Actionfilm Criminal Squad (2018) und dem romantischen Drama After Passion (2019) mit. 2017 gewann sie als Produzentin der Web-Serie The Bay den Daytime Emmy Award für herausragende digitale Daytime-Dramaserien. Sie spielte 2018 neben Sylvester Stallone im Actionfilm Backtrace und 2019 neben Bruce Willis im Thriller 10 Minutes Gone. 2021 spielte sie die Rolle der Mildred Gillars in dem Dramafilm Axis Sally neben Al Pacino, der ihre Leistungen als Schauspielerin und Produzentin jedoch kritisierte.

Meadow Williams war mit ihrem ersten Mann bis 2010 verheiratet. 2010 ehelichte sie den Multimillionär Gerald Kessler. Kessler starb 2015 und Williams erbte fast seinen gesamten Nachlass in Höhe von 800 Millionen US-Dollar. Dieser war zugleich Gegenstand von Klagen von Kesslers Kindern seiner früheren Ehefrau.

data.biography: 杜丽莎（Teresa Carpio，1956年9月30日－），中菲混血儿，香港流行曲歌星，纵横乐坛30年，名作有《假如》、《真爱》及《I Believe I Can Fly》等。之后，杜丽莎曾经移民加拿大，开始当音乐导师，及后回流返香港，学生有郑秀文、薛凯琪、梁咏琪、郑融、张柏芝等。她亦与许多香港知名人士保持良好关系，在2004年翻唱其好友张学友的名曲《爱是永恒》亦获得成功。杜丽莎于第30届(2007年度)十大中文金曲颁奖音乐会中得到乐坛最高殊荣的金针奖。1956年9月30日，杜丽莎的女儿T.V. Carpio于美国出生，亦是一位艺人，并曾参与美国电影及电视的演出，她其中一部参与的美国电影为《恋爱心曲》。杜丽莎投身演艺事业时，年仅六岁，至今已发行过十五张中英文个人大碟，更主演多出电影及音乐剧。出身音乐世家的她，七十年代初期曾以欧西流行曲红遍香港流行乐坛，来粤语流行曲兴起而使其发展受到局限。最后杜丽莎也因大势所趋转唱粤语歌，而她在这方面的成就其实并不下于其英文作品，其中《假如》、《真爱》、《当天》、《天光天黑对住你》、《夜汽车》、《情逢敌手》、《何必放弃》和《仍然得o个一次》等都属出色之作。杜丽莎后来仍坚持灌录唱英文歌曲，是少数于八十年代有推出英文歌的流行歌手之一.杜丽莎可谓乐坛长青树，其歌唱事业更横跨多国。除香港外，杜丽莎童年时代曾在大溪地演出，更是第一位在日本发行唱片的香港歌手，歌迷遍布亚洲及美加等地。
data.name: 杜丽莎

data.biography:
Lena Maria Jonna Olin (born 22 March 1955) is a Swedish actress. She has received nominations for an Academy Award, a Golden Globe Award, a BAFTA Award, and a Primetime Emmy Award.

Mentored by filmmaker Ingmar Bergman, she made her screen debut with a small role in his film Face to Face (1976). After graduating from the drama school, Olin joined the Royal Dramatic Theatre, followed by roles in Bergman's films Fanny and Alexander (1982) and After the Rehearsal (1984). She made her international breakthrough with a role of a free-spirited artist in The Unbearable Lightness of Being (1988), which earned her a nomination for the Golden Globe Award for Best Supporting Actress – Motion Picture.

Olin garnered further critical acclaim for her portrayals of a Jewish survivor in the comedy-drama Enemies, A Love Story (1989), for which she received a nomination for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress, and an abused wife in the comedy-drama Chocolat (2000), for which she received a nomination for the BAFTA Award for Best Actress in a Supporting Role. Her other film roles include The Adventures of Picasso (1978), Havana (1990), Romeo Is Bleeding (1993), Mr. Jones (1993), The Ninth Gate (1999), Queen of the Damned (2002), Casanova (2005), The Reader (2008), Remember Me (2010), Maya Dardel (2017), and The Artist's Wife (2019).

On television, Olin starred as KGB agent Irina Derevko on the spy thriller Alias (2002–2006), which earned her a nomination for the Primetime Emmy Award for Outstanding Supporting Actress in a Drama Series. Her other television roles include the sitcom Welcome to Sweden (2014–2015), the drama series Riviera (2017–2020), and the drama series Hunters (2020–2023).

data.biography: Lena Maria Jonna Olin (n. Estocolmo; 22 de marzo de 1955) es una actriz sueca de teatro, cine y televisión nominada a los y Emmy como mejor actriz. Ha sido nominada para varios premios de actuación, incluyendo un Globo de Oro en 1988 por La insoportable levedad del ser y un Premio de la Academia por Enemigos, una historia de amor en 1989. Otras conocidas películas en las que ha aparecido Olin incluyen Chocolat (dirigida por su marido Lasse Hallström), La reina de los condenados, Casanova y El lector. Olin era también un miembro del reparto principal de la segunda temporada (y una estrella invitada recurrente en las temporadas posteriores) de la exitosa serie de televisión Alias.

Lena Maria Jonna Olin (geb. 22. März 1955) ist eine schwedische Schauspielerin. Sie wurde für mehrere Schauspielpreise nominiert, darunter einen Golden Globe für The Unbearable Lightness of Being (1988) und einen Academy Award for Enemies, A Love Story (1989). Weitere bekannte Filme, in denen sie aufgetreten ist, sind Chocolat (2000), inszeniert von ihrem Mann Lasse Hallström, Queen of the Damned (2002), Casanova (2005) und The Reader (2008). Olin war auch in der zweiten Staffel Hauptdarsteller (und in den späteren Staffeln wiederkehrender Gaststar) der Fernsehserie Alias. Olin spielte in der schwedischen Sitcom Welcome to Sweden.

Lena Maria Jonna Olin (nascida em 22 de março de 1955) é uma atriz sueca. Ela recebeu indicações para um Oscar, um Globo de Ouro, um BAFTA e um Primetime Emmy.

Orientada pelo cineasta Ingmar Bergman, ela estreou nas telas com um pequeno papel em seu filme Face to Face (1976). Depois de se formar na escola de teatro, Olin ingressou no Royal Dramatic Theatre, seguido por papéis nos filmes Fanny e Alexander de Bergman (1982) e After the Rehearsal (1984). Ela fez sua descoberta internacional com o papel de uma artista de espírito livre em The Unbearable Lightness of Being (1988), que lhe rendeu uma indicação ao Globo de Ouro de Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante - Filme.

Olin recebeu mais elogios da crítica por suas interpretações de uma sobrevivente judia na comédia dramática Inimigos, Uma História de Amor (1989), pela qual recebeu uma indicação ao Oscar de Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante e uma vítima de violência doméstica na comédia. drama Chocolat (2000), pelo qual recebeu uma indicação ao Prêmio BAFTA de Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante. Seus outros papéis no cinema incluem The Adventures of Picasso (1978), Havana (1990), Romeo Is Bleeding (1993), Mr. Jones (1993), The Ninth Gate (1999), Queen of the Damned (2002), Casanova (2005) ), The Reader (2008), Remember Me (2010), Maya Dardel (2017) e The Artist's Wife (2019).

Na televisão, Olin estrelou como a agente da KGB Irina Derevko no thriller de espionagem Alias ​​(2002–2006), que lhe rendeu uma indicação ao prêmio Primetime Emmy de Melhor Atriz Coadjuvante em Série Dramática. Seus outros papéis na televisão incluem a sitcom Welcome to Sweden (2014–2015), a série dramática Riviera (2017–2020) e a série dramática Hunters (2020).

Lena Maria Jonna Olin (Estocolm, 22 de març de 1955) és una actriu sueca de teatre, cinema i televisió nominada als i Emmy com a millor actriu. Ha estat nominada per a diversos premis d'actuació, incloent un Globus d'Or el 1988 per La insuportable lleugeresa de l'ésser i un Premi de l'Acadèmia per Enemics, una història d'amor el 1989. Altres conegudes pel·lícules en què ha aparegut Olin inclouen Chocolat ( dirigida pel seu marit Lasse Hallström), La reina dels condemnats, Casanova i El lector. Olin era també un membre del repartiment principal de la segona temporada (i una estrella convidada recurrent a les temporades posteriors) de l'exitosa sèrie de televisió Àlies.

data.biography: Его отец - Адольф Ильин был известным актёром в Свердловском театре, а затем и в московском театре имени Маяковского. В 1969 году окончил Свердловское театральное училище. Работал в театрах Москвы и Казани, в 1974-1989 годах - актёр Театра имени Маяковского в Москве. Роль, принёсшая успех - в спектакле "Агент 00" по Генриху Боровику в постановке Гончарова. В настоящее время играет Гаева в постановке Някрошюса "Вишнёвый сад", Международного Фонда Станиславского и театра "Мено Фортас" (Литва). Первая роль в кино - маленький Гайдн на Свердловском ТВ. Но на большом экране Владимир Ильин появился в 1986 году, сыграв довольно заметную роль - Романа в фильме "Мой любимый клоун". С этого момента его начали много снимать. Он становится одним из самых востребованных актёров постсоветского кино. Снимался также у Цимбала, Митты, Тодоровского, Шенгелия, Месхиева, Филатова, Михалкова и других. Работы, не включенные в фильмографию: "О, не лети так, жизнь…" (2000), документально-постановочная киномонография, автор сценария и режиссёр - Татьяна Воронецкая.
data.name: Владимир Ильин

data.biography:
Edward Amatrudo, 1 Şubat 1956 tarihinde Glendale, Kaliforniya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Oyunculuk kariyerine adım atmadan önce farklı sektörlerde deneyim kazanan Amatrudo, sanat hayatına 1980'lerin sonunda televizyon ve sinema dünyasındaki yan rollerle başladı. Özellikle kariyerinin başlarında, "Miami Vice" gibi dönemin popüler dizilerinde aldığı konuk oyunculuk rolleriyle sektöre ısındı ve kamera önü deneyimi kazandı.

Kariyeri boyunca genellikle otorite figürlerini, polis memurlarını veya bazen de tekinsiz karakterleri canlandıran bir "karakter oyuncusu" olarak tanındı. Sinemadaki ilk dikkat çekici işlerinden biri, Michael Bay'in yönettiği ve Will Smith ile Martin Lawrence'ın başrolünü paylaştığı aksiyon klasiği "Bad Boys" (1995) filmindeki rolü oldu. Bu dönemde ayrıca Denzel Washington'ın başrolünde olduğu "Zaman Tükeniyor" (Out of Time) (2003) ve John Travolta ile Salma Hayek'in oynadığı "Yalnız Kalpler" (Lonely Hearts) (2006) gibi önemli yapımlarda yan roller üstlendi.

Ancak Ed Amatrudo'yu televizyon izleyicisi için unutulmaz kılan ve ona kült bir statü kazandıran proje, 2004-2007 yılları arasında yayınlanan sevilen gençlik-gizem dizisi "Veronica Mars" oldu. Dizide, Şerif Don Lamb'in yanında çalışan, genellikle beceriksiz ama iyi niyetli ve sadık bir polis memuru olan "Deputy Sacks" karakterini canlandırdı. Kristen Bell'in başrolünü oynadığı dizideki bu rolü, hem komik anları hem de dramatik sahneleriyle izleyicilerin sempatisini kazandı. Karakterin popülaritesi sayesinde, dizinin 2014 yılında hayranların desteğiyle çekilen devam filmi "Veronica Mars"ta da (2014) aynı rolle yer aldı.

Televizyon kariyerinde ayrıca "Burn Notice", "The Glades", "Nip/Tuck" ve "Nashville" gibi başarılı dizilerde konuk oyuncu olarak görünen Amatrudo, son yıllarda "The Right Stuff" (2020) gibi dönem dizilerinde ve çeşitli bağımsız filmlerde rol alarak aktif oyunculuk kariyerini sürdürmektedir. Özellikle Florida merkezli yapımların aranan yüzlerinden biri olan oyuncu, doğal oyunculuğu ve canlandırdığı karakterlere kattığı kendine has mizahı ile tanınmaktadır.

Roberto Mancini (Italian pronunciation: [roˈbɛrto manˈtʃiːni]; born 27 November 1964) is an Italian football manager and former player. He has been the manager of the Italy national team since 2018.

As a player, Mancini operated as a deep-lying forward, and was best known for his time at Sampdoria, where he played more than 550 matches, and helped the team win the Serie A league title, four Coppa Italia titles, and the European Cup Winners' Cup. He was capped 36 times for Italy, taking part at UEFA Euro 1988 and the 1990 FIFA World Cup, achieving semi-final finishes in both tournaments, although he was never put onto the pitch during the 1990 tournament. In 1997, after 15 years at Sampdoria, Mancini left the club to join Lazio, where he won a further scudetto and Cup Winners' Cup, in addition to the UEFA Super Cup and two more Coppa Italia titles. Alongside Gianluigi Buffon, he is the player with the most Coppa Italia titles (6). As a player, Mancini would often give team talks at half-time. Towards the end of his playing career he became an assistant to Sven-Göran Eriksson at Lazio.

His first manager role was at Fiorentina in 2001, at only 36 years old, winning a Coppa Italia title. The following season, he took over as manager at Lazio, where he guided the club to another Coppa Italia title. In 2004, Mancini was offered the manager's job at Inter Milan, with which he won three consecutive Serie A titles, a club record; he was dismissed in 2008. After being out of football for over a year, Mancini was appointed Manchester City manager in December 2009. He helped City win the FA Cup in the 2010–11 season, the club's first major trophy in 35 years, and their first league title in 44 years in the 2011–12 season. Mancini took over managerial duties at Turkish club Galatasaray in September 2013, winning the Turkish Cup in his only season at the club, before returning to Inter Milan for two more years before managing Russian side Zenit. In 2018, he took charge of the Italy national team after Italy had failed to qualify for the 2018 FIFA World Cup. In 2021, Mancini guided Italy to their second-ever European Championship at Euro 2020. Under his management, Italy then failed to reach the World Cup for the second time in a row after a loss to North Macedonia.

Regarded as a cup specialist, Mancini has reached at least a semi-final of a major national cup competition in every season he has been a manager, from 2002 to 2014. He holds a number of records, including most consecutive Coppa Italia finals from 2004 to 2008, with Lazio once in 2004 and with Inter Milan in the following four seasons.

data.biography: Enrique Guzmán (born 1 February 1943) is a Mexican singer. He is one of the pioneers of Rock & Roll in Mexico. He, along with Cesar Costa, Angelica Maria, Johnny Laboriel and Alberto Vasquez, among others, were the pioneers of Rock & Roll in Mexico. He is also the father of Mexican singer Alejandra Guzmán by his former wife, actress and politician Silvia Pinal.  Enrique Guzmán was born in Venezuela to Mexican parents. They moved back to Mexico when Enrique was 12. He studied medicine at the Universidad Nacional Autónoma de México although he did not complete his studies.  Guzmán has been a rock star in Mexico throughout the last half of the 20th century, known primarily for his translation of 1950s rock standards, such as "Jailhouse Rock", for Spanish-speaking listeners. In 1958 he joined "Los Teen Tops", along with the Martínez brothers and piano player, Sergio Martel. In 1959 they debuted in the US on CBS radio, and they released their famous version of "La Plaga" (Good Golly Miss Molly). He also wrote several hits for himself "Pensaba en tí", "La Ronchita", and for other Latin stars.  He also appeared in films, such as Canta Mi Corazón in 1965. His hits include Spanish covers of "Put Your Head On My Shoulder", "Rolly Polly", "Bonnie Moronie" as well as the original "Dame Felicidad" ("Give Me Joy"). During the mid-1960s Guzmán formed a motion picture company and produced some films in Ecuador. In the late 1960s, Guzman and his wife, Silvia Pinal, starred in a television show called Silvia y Enrique. He has continued recording, including with his daughter Alejandra Guzmán, throughout the 1990s and 2000s. As with his ex-wife and his daughter, he has his handprints embedded onto the Paseo de las Luminarias; he was inducted in 1983 for his work in the recording industry.
data.name: Enrique Guzmán

data.biography: Samy Naceri was born on July 2, 1961 in Paris, France as Saïd Naceri. He is an actor and producer, known for Taxi (1998), Taxi Taxi (2000) and Léon - Der Profi (1994). He has been married to Marie Guillard since 2005. His father Djilali comes from Algeria and his mother Jacqueline from Normandy. Samy grew up in modest circumstances with seven siblings. An older brother died of complications from drug use. Naceris father left the family when he was 16 years old.In his early twenties he was involved in a traffic accident, which left permanent scars on the left side of the face.

data.biography:
Saïd Naceri, dit Samy Naceri, né le 2 juillet 1961 à Paris 4e, (Seine), est un acteur franco-algérien. Il fut révélé pour avoir interprété le rôle de Daniel Morales, dans la saga cinématographique Taxi de Gérard Pirès et Gérard Krawczyk. Ces films lui permettent de devenir une vedette dans les années 1990.

En parallèle de cette saga, il obtient des rôles dans des productions telles que Le Petit Poucet (2001), Nid de guêpes (2001), La Mentale (2002), Indigènes (2006) ou encore Les Méchants (2021).

Samy Naceri est né le 2 juillet 1961 à Paris 4e, (Seine), d'une mère française, originaire de Normandie, et d'un père de l'ouest algérien. Élevé dans un logement modeste rue Saint-Martin avec ses six frères et sœurs, dont l'un, Larbi Naceri, dit: «Bibi Nacéri» est devenu acteur et scénariste, il déménage ensuite avec sa famille dans le quartier très difficile de la ZUP du Val de Fontenay à Fontenay-sous-Bois. Il manque alors souvent l'école, si bien que ses parents l'envoient en internat à Montlhéry, puis dans d'autres établissements, toujours en internat. Son père l'emmène finalement avec lui travailler sur des chantiers.

Olivier Dahan lui donne son premier grand rôle dans Frères: La Roulette rouge, téléfilm pour la chaîne Arte, dans la série Tous les garçons et les filles de leur âge. Thomas Gilou lui confie ensuite le rôle de Nordine dans le film Raï aux côtés de Manu Layotte «Poisson». Naceri récolte deux prix d'interprétation, Le Léopard de bronze au Festival international du film de Locarno et une mention spéciale au Festival du film de Paris, le film Raï obtenant dans le même temps Le léopard d'or du long métrage. Une trentaine de films et téléfilms s'ensuivront.

Samy Naceri a rencontré Luc Besson lors du tournage de Léon (1994), dans lequel le jeune acteur tenait le rôle d'un policier du Swat encagoulé. Ils se rencontrent à nouveau lorsque Samy Naceri fait une apparition dans le clip Nés sous la même étoile du groupe IAM.

Besson confie à l'acteur le rôle de Daniel Morales, un jeune chauffeur de taxi de Marseille qui se passionne pour les voitures puissantes et la vitesse folle. C'est ce rôle qui fera connaître Samy du grand public. Le film Taxi (1998) atteint 12 millions d'entrées. Le succès du premier épisode a permis la production de Taxi 2 (2000), Taxi 3 (2003) et Taxi 4 (2007). Il joue également le rôle d'un militaire kabyle dans Là-bas... mon pays d'Alexandre Arcady.

En 2006, Rachid Bouchareb lui propose le rôle de Yassir dans le film Indigènes, ce qui lui vaudra à lui et à ses partenaires (Jamel Debbouze, Roschdy Zem, Sami Bouajila et Bernard Blancan) le Prix d'interprétation masculine au Festival de Cannes. Il est également un triomphe, en réalisant 3,2 millions d'entrées, tout en étant acclamé par la critique. Des problèmes de santé, ainsi que judiciaires ont rendu sa présence à l'écran plus rare dans les années qui ont suivi.

En 2012, de retour devant les caméras, il participe à la comédie française Tip Top de Serge Bozon, aux côtés d'Isabelle Huppert, Sandrine Kiberlain et François Damiens, où son étreinte sado-maso avec Isabelle Huppert est l'un des sommets du film. Cette comédie est sélectionnée à la Quinzaine des réalisateurs du festival de Cannes 2013. ...

data.overview: Quyến Luyến Lúm Đồng Tiền kể về câu chuyện của nữ bạo chúa học đường Đường Song Ký (Trần Ý Hàm thủ vai), người đang đối mặt với 3 điều không: không việc, không tình và không tiền. Cô buộc phải trở về quê hương để làm nhân viên lễ tân, vốn muốn trở thành người bình thường sống cuộc sống qua ngày nhưng vì tài năng thiên bẩm, tầm hồn thu ví và tính cách thẳng thắn nên Đường Song Ký đã vô tình thu hút sự chú ý của ba chàng trai. Họ đều là những người đẹp trai nhưng hoàn toàn khác biệt về tính cách và cả ba thích Đường Song Ký bởi lúm đồng tiền của cô nàng.

data.biography:
Having grown up in Cambridgeshire and excelled at drama in school, Robinson went on to enroll as a Philosophy undergraduate at the University of Birmingham, before putting his studies on hold after successfully auditioning for his breakout role as troublemaker Isaac, in Series 2 of the hugely popular show Sex Education, which launched on Netflix in January 2020.

Robinson quickly became popular with fans of the show for his portrayal of the playful, sarcastic Isaac, who, with his brother Joe, moves into the caravan park where Maeve lives. Masking his insecurities and a developing crush on Maeve with his razor-sharp wit and mischievous pranking, he soon becomes entangled in a love triangle with Maeve and Otis, throwing up some challenging moral decisions for Isaac.

Isaac was also Sex Education's first disabled character, once again restating the show's fresh approach to depicting a multiplicity of characters, backgrounds and stories. Robinson was paralysed in an accident during a school rugby match in South Africa in 2015, at the age of 17.
data.name: George Robinson

data.biography: Joshua Mikel is an actor, playwright, and music video director from Conyers, GA, and a graduate of Florida State University's Theatre and Creative Writing programs. While at FSU, he worked closely with their acclaimed film school as an actor and storyboard artist for dozens of student shorts. During his undergraduate years and following graduation, he toured the U.S. extensively as a founding member and drummer for the indie rock band Look Mexico. After parting ways with the band in 2010, he returned to his home state to pursue a career in film and television. He is a six time published playwright known particularly for his theatre for young audiences works, "The Monster Hunters," and "Good Good Trouble on Bad Bad Island." As a music video director, he has created and animated videos for the acts Against Me!, Waxahatchee, Jake Bugg, Neon Trees, American Authors, and Fake Problems. He lives in Atlanta, Georgia where he is represented by J. Pervis Talent.
data.name: Joshua Mikel

data.biography: 约书亚·米克尔 （Joshua Mikel） 是来自佐治亚州康尼尔斯的演员、剧作家和音乐视频导演，毕业于佛罗里达州立大学戏剧和创意写作课程。在FSU期间，他作为演员和故事板艺术家与他们广受赞誉的电影学院密切合作，制作了数十部学生短片。在本科期间和毕业后，他作为独立摇滚乐队Look Mexico的创始成员和鼓手在美国进行了广泛的巡回演出。2010年与乐队分道扬镳后，他回到家乡从事电影和电视事业。他是一位六次出版的剧作家，尤其以他为年轻观众创作的戏剧作品《怪物猎人》和《坏坏岛上的好麻烦》而闻名。作为音乐录影带导演，他为《Against Me！》、《Waxahatchee》、《Jake Bugg》、《Neon Trees》、《American Authors》和《Fake Problems》等作品创作了视频并制作了动画。他住在佐治亚州亚特兰大，由 J. Pervis Talent 代理。
data.name: 约书亚·米克尔

data.biography: 約書亞·米克爾 （Joshua Mikel） 是來自佐治亞州康尼爾斯的演員、劇作家和音樂視頻導演，畢業於佛羅裏達州立大學戲劇和創意寫作課程。在 FSU 期間，他作為演員和故事板藝術家與他們廣受讚譽的電影學院密切合作，製作了數十部學生短片。在本科期間和畢業後，他作為獨立搖滾樂隊 Look Mexico 的創始成員和鼓手在美國進行了廣泛的巡迴演出。2010 年與樂隊分道揚鑣後，他回到家鄉從事電影和電視事業。他是一位六次出版的劇作家，尤其以他為年輕觀眾創作的戲劇作品《魔物獵人》和《壞壞島上的好麻煩》而聞名。作為音樂錄影帶導演，他為《Against Me！》、《Waxahatchee》、《Jake Bugg》、《Neon Trees》、《American Authors》和《Fake Problems》等作品創作了視頻並製作了動畫。他住在佐治亞州亞特蘭大，由 J.Pervis Talent 代理。
data.name: 約書亞·米克爾

data.biography: Sinqua Walls, né le 6 avril 1985 en Louisiane, est un acteur américain dont la carrière s’étend à la télévision et au cinéma depuis les années 2000. Il étudie le théâtre et le cinéma à l’Université de San Francisco, après des débuts dans le basket universitaire. Il se fait connaître par des rôles dans des séries dramatiques adolescentes, notamment The Secret Life of the American Teenager où il incarne Daniel et Teen Wolf et où il joue Boyd, un loup-garou bêta.  Il apparaît aussi dans Friday Night Lights, Once Upon a Time, Power et d’autres productions télévisées.  Au cinéma, on le retrouve dans Shark Night 3D, The 15:17 to Paris de Clint Eastwood, Otherhood, Nanny et White Men Can’t Jump (2023).  Grâce à sa capacité à jouer des personnages sensibles, physiques et charismatiques, Sinqua Walls s’impose comme un acteur versatile dans le paysage audiovisuel contemporain.
data.name: Sinqua Walls

data.biography:
Jonathan Patrick Foo (was born in 30 October 1982) is an English actor, martial artist and stuntman of mixed Chinese and Irish descent

He was born in London to a Chinese father from Singapore, and an Irish mother from England, which is also where he grew up. His siblings include a little sister and two half-sisters from his father's side. His family constantly relocated as he grew up. His father practices karate and his mother practices judo. He started learning kung fu when he was eight years old but he began serious training for wushu when he was 15. He currently lives in Los Angeles Being a practitioner of Wushu, he has starred in Tom-Yum-Goong (US title: The Protector), Batman Begins, House of Fury, Left for Dead, and Life (Shi cha qi xiao shi). He also does stunts for other actors. He is best known for recently playing the role of Jin Kazama in the 2010 live action movie movie Tekken released in 2010. He also received a role as Ryu in the short film Street Fighter: Legacy. He also starred in Universal Soldier: Regeneration (2010) as one of the first generation soldiers. He is also set to appear in a Thai martial arts-basketball film Fireball Begins, which is a prequel to the first film, Fireball.
data.name: Jonathan Patrick Foo

data.biography: 傅尊出生于1982年10月30日，他的父亲是新加坡华人，母亲是住在伦敦的爱尔兰人，他还有一个亲妹妹和两个同父异母的姐姐。他在伦敦西南部长大。在他的成长生涯中，他的家庭不断搬迁。傅尊的父亲会空手道，母亲会柔道，这使他从小就对武术十分感兴趣。他8岁的时候就开始习武，但没有经过严格的训练，到15岁的时候开始得到正规的指导。目前居住在美国洛杉矶。 　　最为一个武术特技演员，他在电影《冬荫功》、《蝙蝠侠：开展时刻》、《精武家庭》、《求生之路》和《时差七小时》中都参演了角色。他也作为替身演员参演过电影。他在德怀特H·里特（Dwight H. Little）指导的电影《铁拳》（2010年上映）中饰演风间仁的角色。最近，他又被邀请扮演同人电影短片《街头霸王：遗志》中的龙（Ryu）这个角色，和他一同出演的还有其他一些武术明星，如克利斯汀·霍华德饰演健（Ken）。在《再造战士：重生》中他扮演一个第一代战士，但是出镜率不高，在开场20分钟后就死掉了，在该片中，他将与好莱坞武打巨星尚格·云顿及道夫·龙格尔一同演出。他还将在泰国电影《烈焰之球：出征》（《烈焰之球》的续集）中出现。
data.name: 傅尊

data.biography:
傅尊出生於 1982 年 10 月 30 日，他的父親是新加坡華人，母親是住在倫敦的愛爾蘭人，他還有一個親妹妹和兩個同父異母的姐姐。他在倫敦西南部長大。在他的成長生涯中，他的家庭不斷搬遷。傅尊的父親會空手道，母親會柔道，這使他從小就對武術十分感興趣。他 8 歲的時候就開始習武，但沒有經過嚴格的訓練，到 15 歲的時候開始得到正規的指導。目前居住在美國洛杉磯。

最為一個武術特技演員，他在電影《冬蔭功》、《蝙蝠俠：開展時刻》、《精武家庭》、《求生之路》和《時差七小時》中都參演了角色。他也作為替身演員參演過電影。他在德懷特 H·裏特（Dwight H.Little）指導的電影《再戰擊情》（2010 年上映）中飾演風間仁的角色。最近，他又被邀請扮演同人電影短片《街頭霸王：遺志》中的龍（Ryu）這個角色，和他一同出演的還有其他一些武術明星，如克利斯汀·霍華德飾演健（Ken）。在《再造戰士：重生》中他扮演一個第一代戰士，但是出鏡率不高，在開場 20 分鍾後就死掉了，在該片中，他將與好萊塢武打巨星尚格·雲頓及道夫·龍格爾一同演出。他還將在泰國電影《烈焰之球：出徵》（《烈焰之球》的續集）中出現。
data.name: 傅尊

data.biography:
Bright Vachirawit Chivaaree is a Thai actor and singer signed under Riser Music. Born in Nakhon Pathom as Kunlatorn Chivaaree to a Thai-American father and a Thai-Chinese mother, Bright speaks both Thai and English. He has a BBA in marketing from Bangkok University's international programme.

In 2013, he made his debut in the entertainment industry as a host on the show "Strawberry Krubcake" and as an actor starring in the short "The Beginning: Run Lover!!!" In 2020, Bright signed his contract with GMMTV. His contract ended in August of 2023 and moved to his own management company Cloud9 Entertainment.

Outside his career as an actor and singer, Bright owns the clothing brand Astro Stuffs. He's in a relationship with singer Nene Pornnappan.
data.name: Vachirawit Chivaaree

data.biography:
Brightはタイの俳優・歌手であり、モデルや実業家としても活動している人物です。1997年12月27日、タイのナコーンパトムで生まれました。

彼は2013年、タイの若者向け番組「Strawberry Krubcake」の司会として芸能界に入り、その後はモデルや俳優として活動を続けました。当初は小さな役やバラエティ番組への出演が中心でしたが、経験を積みながら徐々に知名度を高めていきました。

2020年にはドラマ「2gether: The Series」に主演し、サラワット役を演じたことで大きな注目を集めます。この作品はタイ国内だけでなくアジアや世界でも人気を獲得し、Brightは一躍国際的なスターとなりました。共演したWin Metawinとのコンビは「BrightWin」として広く知られるようになります。

その後も俳優として活動を続け、2021年にはタイ版「花より男子」である「F4 Thailand: Boys Over Flowers」に主演し、さらに人気を広げました。

また、ファッション界でも大きな影響力を持ち、イギリスのブランドBurberryのアンバサダーを務めるなど、国際的なブランドと数多くの仕事をしています。さらに、自身のアパレルブランド「ASTRO Stuffs」を立ち上げ、2023年には事務所を独立して「Cloud9 Entertainment」を設立するなどビジネス分野にも進出しました。現在は俳優・歌手・ファッションアイコン・起業家として幅広く活動し、国内の支援活動にも積極的に参加しています。
data.name: ワチラウィット・チワアリー

data.overview: Phim là hành trình của Jo Deul Ho, một cựu công tố viên tài ba đi tìm công lý sau khi bị chèn ép bởi bất công xã hội. Mặt Trái Của Công Lý phơi bày những vấn đề của xã hội hiện nay như tham nhũng, ngược đãi, gian lận kinh doanh... Deul Ho cùng những người bạn: Dae Soo, Ae Ra và Eun Jo gặp nhiều thử thách trong quá trình thực thi chính nghĩa. Trải qua nhiều vụ án, nhóm luật sư nhật được nhiều manh mối quay về chủ tịch Jung. Nhưng sự thật, chủ tịch Jung lại không phải là kẻ giấu mặt cuối cùng. Vậy kẻ đứng sau những án oan, chủ mưu mọi thứ thực sự là ai?

data.biography:
Evander Holyfield (born October 19, 1962) is an American former professional boxer who competed between 1984 and 2011. He reigned as the undisputed champion at cruiserweight in the late 1980s and at heavyweight in the early 1990s, and is the only boxer in history to win the undisputed championship in two weight classes in the three belt era.

Nicknamed "the Real Deal", Holyfield is the only four-time world heavyweight champion, having held the unified WBA, WBC, and IBF titles from 1990 to 1992, the WBA and IBF titles again from 1993 to 1994, the WBA title a third time from 1996 to 1999; the IBF title a third time from 1997 to 1999 and the WBA title for a fourth time from 2000 to 2001.
data.name: Evander Holyfield

data.biography: Η Chui Na Li Sha, γεννημένη ως Ji Jia He στην πόλη Yancheng, στην επαρχία Jiangsu, είναι Κινέζα τραγουδίστρια και ηθοποιός.

Ji Jiahe (嵇嘉禾), also known by her stage name Chui Na Li Sha (锤娜丽莎), is a Chinese actress and comedian born on November 19, 1996 in Yancheng, Jiangsu Province, China. Widely recognized for her offbeat humor and expressive performances, she quickly made a name for herself across television, streaming platforms, and variety shows.

Her career spans numerous genres, from comedic sketches and stand-up to dramatic roles and quirky leads in modern Chinese dramas. Notable credits include Delicacies Destiny (2021), My Impossible Life (2022), Mi Xiao Circle School Notes (2022), Ha Ha Maker (2024), and Better Halves (2025). She has also charmed audiences on popular variety programs like Hello Saturday, Singing With Legends, and Everybody Stand By.

Ji Jiahe’s vibrant personality, satirical edge, and fearless approach to character work continue to make her one of China’s most compelling and versatile entertainers.
data.name: Ji Jiahe

data.overview: Cô gái 16 tuổi Vương Gia Mai (Xuân Hạ) cùng mẹ (Kim Yến Linh) lưu lạc từ Hồ Nam đến Hong Kong. Tại đây mẹ cô tái giá với người đàn ông khác khiến nảy sinh mâu thuẫn giữa cô nữ sinh đảm đang và tài năng với dượng. Đây chính là lúc cô lầm đường lạc lối hành nghề mại dâm, từ đó gặp phải những khách làng chơi biến thái. Sau cùng, Gia Mai bị sát hại và chặt xác ra thành nhiều mảnh một cách vô dùn dã man, mà theo truyền thông Hong Kong đưa tin thì những bộ phận cơ thể của cô gái đáng thương bị vứt vương vãi khắp trên phố. Lúc này A Tạng (Quách Phú Thành) cùng đồng nghiệp là Yên Sạn (Đàm Diệu Văn) điều tra vụ án và phát hiện những chứng cứ về gã tài xế xe tải cục súc Đinh Tử Thông (Bạch Chỉ). Chính A Tạng đã buộc Thông tự thú và khai ra toàn bộ vụ việc. Tuy nhiên A Tàng cảm thấy vẫn còn điều khả nghi, anh quyết định điều tra những người xung quanh Mai và Thông, để rồi phát hiện ra chân tướng phía sau vụ án.
data.title: Đạp Huyết Tầm Mai

data.biography: Mekhi Thira Phifer (born December 29, 1974) is an American actor. He is perhaps best known for his multi-year role as Dr. Greg Pratt on NBC's long-running medical drama ER and his co-starring role opposite Eminem in the feature film 8 Mile. He was a regular on the Fox crime show Lie to Me portraying the role of Ben Reynolds, before season 3. He was born in in Harlem, New York City, the son of Rhoda Phifer, a high school teacher; he grew up in a single-parent household with his mother. His acting career began in 1995, when Phifer attended an open casting call for director Spike Lee’s Clockers, beating over a thousand others to get the lead role as a narcotics dealer embroiled in a murder cover-up. He followed that role with another in the comedy spoof feature High School High (which also starred his former wife Malinda Williams) and continued by co-starring in the fright flick I Still Know What You Did Last Summer, starring Jennifer Love Hewitt and Freddie Prinze, Jr. Among Phifer’s other big-screen credits are Soul Food, The Biography of Spud Webb, Hell’s Kitchen, NYC, Tears of a Clown, O (as the titular character Odin a.k.a. O), and the thriller Uninvited Guest (as Silk). He appeared in Impostor as well as Paid in Full, 8 Mile, opposite Eminem and Dawn of the Dead. Phifer has a son, Omikaye, with his ex-wife, actress Malinda Williams. His second son, Mekhi Thira Phifer Jr., was born to his girlfriend Oni Souratha in Los Angeles on October 30, 2007.
data.name: Mekhi Phifer

data.biography:
Mekhi Phifer (* 29. Dezember 1974 in Harlem, New York) ist ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Zwischen 19 und 21 Jahren begann er seine Schauspielkarriere, als er zu einem Casting für den Film „Clockers“ antrat. Hier wurde ihm die Hauptrolle zugesprochen. Er bekam sehr viel Lob von seinen Schauspielkollegen, unter anderem John Turturro, Delroy Lindo und Harvey Keitel.

Er spielte zudem in Musikvideos mit, unter anderem von 50 Cent, Craig Mack, Wu-Tang Clan, En Vogue, Brandy, Keith Sweat und Monica. Nach diversen weiteren (kleinen) Rollen kam dann sein Durchbruch mit der Rolle des „Future“ in 8 Mile, in dem er mit Eminem zusammen spielte.

Von 2002 bis 2008 gehörte Phifer der Hauptbesetzung der US-amerikanischen Fernsehserie Emergency Room – Die Notaufnahme an, in der er den eigenwilligen Dr. Gregory Pratt verkörperte.

美国演员。他最出名的可能是他在 NBC 长期播出的医疗剧《急诊室》中饰演格雷格·普拉特博士的多年角色，以及他在故事片《8 英里》中与阿姆对戏的联合主演角色。在第 3 季之前，他是福克斯犯罪节目《对我撒谎》的常客，饰演本·雷诺兹 （Ben Reynolds） 的角色。他出生于纽约市哈莱姆区，是高中教师罗达·菲弗（Rhoda Phifer）的儿子。他和母亲在一个单亲家庭长大。他的演艺生涯始于 1995 年，当时 Phifer 参加了导演斯派克·李 （Spike Lee） 的 Clockers 的公开选角，击败了其他一千多人，获得了一名卷入谋杀掩盖的毒贩的主角。紧随其后的是喜剧恶搞片《高中高中》（该剧也由他的前妻玛琳达·威廉姆斯主演），并继续共同主演了由詹妮弗·洛芙·休伊特和小弗雷迪·普林兹主演的恐怖电影《我仍然知道你去年夏天做了什么》。Phifer 的其他大银幕作品包括《灵魂食物》、《斯普德·韦伯传》、《纽约地狱厨房》、《小丑的眼泪》、《O》（饰演名义角色奥丁又名 O）和惊悚片《不速之客》（饰演 Silk）。他出现在《冒名顶替者》以及《全额支付》、《8 英里》中，与《阿姆》和《亡灵黎明》相对。Phifer 与他的前妻、女演员 Malinda Williams 育有一子 Omikaye。2007 年 10 月 30 日，他的第二个儿子 Mekhi Thira Phifer Jr. 在洛杉矶与女友 Oni Souratha 出生。

data.biography: 美國演員。他最出名的可能是他在 NBC 長期播出的醫療劇《急診室》中飾演格雷格·普拉特博士的多年角色，以及他在故事片《8 英裏》中與阿姆對戲的聯合主演角色。在第 3 季之前，他是福克斯犯罪節目《對我撒謊》的常客，飾演本·雷諾茲 （Ben Reynolds） 的角色。他出生於紐約市哈萊姆區，是高中教師羅達·菲弗（Rhoda Phifer）的兒子。他和母親在一個單親家庭長大。他的演藝生涯始於 1995 年，當時 Phifer 參加了導演斯派克·李 （Spike Lee） 的 Clockers 的公開選角，擊敗了其他一千多人，獲得了一名捲入謀殺掩蓋的毒販的主角。緊隨其後的是喜劇惡搞片《高中高中》（該劇也由他的前妻瑪琳達·威廉姆斯主演），並繼續共同主演了由詹妮弗·洛芙·休伊特和小弗雷迪·普林茲主演的恐怖電影《我仍然知道你去年夏天做了什麼》。Phifer 的其他大銀幕作品包括《靈魂食物》、《斯普德·韋伯傳》、《紐約地獄廚房》、《小醜的眼淚》、《O》（飾演名義角色奧丁又名 O）和驚悚片《神秘訪客》（飾演 Silk）。他出現在《冒名頂替者》以及《全額支付》、《8 英裏》中，與《阿姆》和《亡靈黎明》相對。Phifer 與他的前妻、女演員 Malinda Williams 育有一子 Omikaye。2007 年 10 月 30 日，他的第二個兒子 Mekhi Thira Phifer Jr. 在洛杉磯與女友 Oni Souratha 出生。

data.biography:
Amanda Lawrence is a British actress.

In the 2010s she appeared in several television shows, including Above Suspicion, Dead Boss, Midsomer Murders “A Rare Bird” 2012 as Olivia Carter and Mr Selfridge. She also took roles in films, including Womb (2010) and Suffragette (2015). She appeared in a National Theatre production of Angels in America in 2017,[6] and later that year took the role of Resistance commander Larma D'Acy in Star Wars: The Last Jedi, and reprised the role in Star Wars: The Rise of Skywalker. In 2019, she appeared in a London production of Top Girls.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Jesper Christensen (born 16 May 1948) is a Danish actor. A veteran of European cinema, he has more recently made the transition to English language projects, including The Interpreter and Revelations. He has also appeared as the mysterious villain Mr. White in the James Bond film Casino Royale and its sequel, Quantum of Solace.

In his home country, Christensen has won 4 Bodil Awards, 3 for Best Actor (Hør, var der ikke en som lo?, Bænken, and Drabet) and 1 for Best Supporting Actor (Barbara).

In 2006 Jesper Christensen declined when offered to receive the Knight's Cross of the Order of the Dannebrog. He thought the entire idea of monarchy is a crime to the members of the royal family and does not fit with modern ideas.

data.biography:
Jesper Christensen (født 16. maj 1948) er en dansk skuespiller. Han er en af dansk films mest succesrige skuespillere, og hans arbejde er fem gange blevet belønnet med en Bodil-statuette. For bedste hovedrolle i filmene Før frosten, Hør, var der ikke en som lo?, Bænken, Drabet og for bedste birolle i Barbara. Derudover har han vundet seks Roberter: for bedste hovedrolle i Bænken, bedste birolle i Sofie, Den russiske sangerinde og Barbara og for bedste birolle i tv-serien Arvingerne, samt endnu en for instruktion af Arvingerne . Mange vil huske ham som Nanas far i serien Nana, fra dansk tv i 1988.

esper Allan Christensen, skuespiller, instruktør og filmproducent, debuterede på Studenterscenen i "Træningslejren" i 1968. Han var derefter arbejdsmand på Grønland og foretog pædagog-studier på Frøbel Seminariet. I 1971 blev han tilknyttet Fiolteatret, som elev, skuespiller, billetsælger og rengøringsassistent. Siden har han bl.a. spillet på Det Danske Teater, Rialto Teatret, Aveny Teatret, Det kgl. Teater, Betty Nansen Teatret og Edison. Jesper Christensen fik sin spillefilmsdebut i 1976 i "Strømer", hvor han havde en mindre rolle som ung betjent overfor bl.a. Jens Okking. Herefter fulgte en lang række film. Han huskes bl.a. for sine roller som omsorgsfuld far i filmen "Vinterbørn" fra 1978 og som den dybt kværulantiske far i filmen "Italiensk for begyndere" fra 2000. Jesper Christensen er også kendt for sin forrygende rolle - atter som faderen - i TV-serien "Nana" og han fik stor anerkendelse for sin rolle som den alkoholiserede Kaj i "Bænken" fra 2001. I 2006 spillede Jesper Christensen Bond-skurken Mr. White i "Casino Royale" og i 2008 i Bond-filmen "Quantum of Solace". Jesper Christensen fik en Robert i 1979 for bedste hovedrolle i "Hør var der ikke en som lo", Robert i 1993 for bedste birolle i "Sofie", Robert i 1994 for bedste birolle i "Den russiske sangerinde", Bodil i 1998 for bedste birolle i "Barbara" og både Bodil og Robert i 2001 for bedste hovedrolle i "Bænken". Han var 1995-99 medlem af Teaterrådet. Sidst i 1970erne var han i to år kæreste med skuespillerinden Ghita Nørby. Jesper Christensen har tidligere været gift med scenografen Karin Betz og er nu gift med teaterleder Tove Bornhøft, der leder teatret Rio Rose.
data.name: Jesper Christensen

data.biography: Andrew Scott Rannells was born on August 23, 1978 in the city of Omaha (Nebraska), in the United States. He studied in the Creighton Preparatory School in his hometown, and after finishing secondary, briefly attended Marymount Manhattan College. Throughout his career, Rannells won a Grammy Award and was nominated for the Tony Awards. He is known for his portrayal as Elder Price in the 2011 Broadway musical "The Book of Mormon", for which he received a nomination for the Tony Award for Best Performance by a Leading Actor in a Musical. He won the 2012 Grammy Award for Best Musical Theater Album as a featured soloist on the musical's original Broadway cast recording. His other credits on Broadway include the works of "Jersey Boys" as Bob Gaudio and "Hairspray", as Link Larkin. Andrew began his career in film and television in the mid-90's, developed primarily as a voice artist. Between the numerous animated series in which he has worked, titles are counted as "Street Sharks", "One Piece", "Yugio: Duel Monsters", "Yu-Gi-Oh!", "Liberty's Kids: Est. 1776", "Shaman Kingu," Kakutou ryouri densetsu bistro recipe", " Cubix, "Sonic X", Robots for Everyone", "Pokémon" and" Shukan Pok mon hosokyoku ". Rannells played the role of Elijah Krantz on the HBO series "Girls" and had the leading role of Bryan Buckley in the NBC series "The New Normal". Andrew also filmed some feature films - he had a brief participation in "Sex and the City 2" (2010), and a role of starring in the comedy starring Kirsten Dunst, "Bachelorette" (2012).  In 2014, Rannells filled in as a replacement for Hedwig in the rock musical "Hedwig and the Angry Inch". A year later, Rannells briefly played the role of King George III in the hit Broadway musical "Hamilton". He soon secured the role of Whizzer Brown in the Broadway revival of "Falsettos", directed by James Lapine. In 2018, Rannells portrayed the role of Larry in the Broadway musical "The Boys in the Band", alongside other notable actors. He is currently playing the role of Blair Pfaff in the American comedy series "Black Monday" on Showtime.
data.name: Andrew Rannells

data.biography: 安德鲁·斯科特·兰内尔斯（Andrew Scott Rannells）于1978年8月23日出生于美国奥马哈市（内布拉斯加州）。他就读于家乡的克赖顿预备学校，中学毕业后，曾短暂就读于玛丽蒙特曼哈顿学院。在他的整个职业生涯中，兰内尔斯获得了格莱美奖，并获得了托尼奖的提名。他因在 2011 年百老汇音乐剧《摩尔门经》中饰演普莱斯长老而闻名，并因此获得了托尼奖音乐剧男主角最佳表演奖提名。他获得了 2012 年格莱美奖最佳音乐剧专辑奖，作为音乐剧原版百老汇演员录音的特色独奏家。他在百老汇的其他作品包括饰演鲍勃·高迪奥的“泽西男孩”和饰演林克·拉金的“发胶”。安德鲁在 90 年代中期开始了他的电影和电视职业生涯，主要是一名配音艺术家。在他参与的众多动画系列中，标题被算作“街头鲨鱼”、“海贼王”、“Yugio：决斗怪物”、“Yu-Gi-Oh！”、“Liberty's Kids： Est. 1776”、“Shaman Kingu”、“Kakutou ryouri densetsu bistro recipe”、“Cubix”、“Sonic X”、“Robots for Everyone”、“Pokémon”和“Shukan Pok mon hosokyoku”。兰内尔斯在HBO电视剧《女孩》中扮演伊利亚·克兰茨的角色，并在NBC电视剧《新常态》中扮演布莱恩·巴克利的主角。安德鲁还拍摄了一些故事片——他短暂地参与了《欲望都市 2》（2010 年），并主演了克尔斯滕·邓斯特主演的喜剧片《单身汉》（2012 年）。2014年，兰内尔斯在摇滚音乐剧《海德薇与愤怒的英寸》中取代了海德薇。一年后，兰内尔斯在热门百老汇音乐剧《汉密尔顿》中短暂扮演了乔治三世国王的角色。他很快在詹姆斯·拉平（James Lapine）执导的百老汇复兴版《假人》（Falsettos）中获得了惠泽·布朗（Whizzer Brown）的角色。2018 年，兰内尔斯与其他著名演员一起在百老汇音乐剧《乐队中的男孩》中饰演拉里一角。他目前在Showtime的美国喜剧系列“黑色星期一”中扮演布莱尔·普法夫（Blair Pfaff）的角色。
data.name: 安德鲁·兰内尔斯

data.biography: 安德魯·斯科特·蘭內爾斯（Andrew Scott Rannells）於 1978 年 8 月 23 日出生於美國奧馬哈市（內布拉斯加州）。他就讀於家鄉的克賴頓預備學校，中學畢業後，曾短暫就讀於瑪麗蒙特曼哈頓學院。在他的整個職業生涯中，蘭內爾斯獲得了格萊美獎，並獲得了託尼獎的提名。他因在 2011 年百老匯音樂劇《摩爾門經》中飾演普萊斯長老而聞名，並因此獲得了託尼獎音樂劇男主角最佳表演獎提名。他獲得了 2012 年格萊美獎最佳音樂劇專輯獎，作為音樂劇原版百老匯演員錄音的特色獨奏家。他在百老匯的其他作品包括飾演鮑勃·高迪奧的“澤西男孩”和飾演林克·拉金的“髮膠”。安德魯在 90 年代中期開始了他的電影和電視職業生涯，主要是一名配音藝術家。在他參與的眾多動畫系列中，標題被算作“街頭鯊魚”、“海賊王”、“Yugio：決鬥怪物”、“Yu - Gi - Oh！”、“Liberty's Kids： Est. 1776”、“Shaman Kingu”、“Kakutou ryouri densetsu bistro recipe”、“Cubix”、“Sonic X”、“Robots for Everyone”、“Pokémon”和“Shukan Pok mon hosokyoku”。蘭內爾斯在 HBO 電視劇《女孩》中扮演伊利亞·克蘭茨的角色，並在 NBC 電視劇《新常態》中扮演布萊恩·巴克利的主角。安德魯還拍攝了一些故事片——他短暫地參與了《慾望都市 2》（2010 年），並主演了克爾斯滕·鄧斯特主演的喜劇片《單身漢》（2012 年）。2014 年，蘭內爾斯在搖滾音樂劇《海德薇與憤怒的英寸》中取代了海德薇。一年後，蘭內爾斯在熱門百老匯音樂劇《漢密爾頓》中短暫扮演了喬治三世國王的角色。他很快在詹姆斯·拉平（James Lapine）執導的百老匯復興版《假人》（Falsettos）中獲得了惠澤·布朗（Whizzer Brown）的角色。2018 年，蘭內爾斯與其他著名演員一起在百老匯音樂劇《樂隊中的男孩》中飾演拉裏一角。他目前在 Showtime 的美國喜劇系列“黑色星期一”中扮演布萊爾·普法夫（Blair Pfaff）的角色。
data.name: 安德魯·蘭內爾斯

data.biography:
Elister Larry Wilmore, né le 30 octobre 1961 à Los Angeles, est un acteur, scénariste, producteur et présentateur de télévision américain.

Il est notamment le présentateur de l'émission The Nightly Show with Larry Wilmore sur Comedy Central.

Il a reçu le Primetime Emmy Award du meilleur scénario pour une série télévisée comique en 2002 pour The Bernie Mac Show.

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia.

Melissa Sagemiller (born June 1, 1974, height 5' 6" (1,68 m)) is an American television and film actress.

Sagemiller was born in Washington, D.C. to a political activist mother and a professional American football player father, who played in the NFL for the New York Giants and the Washington Redskins. She attended Georgetown Day School. Her entry into the performing arts was at age 3 when she began studying tap dance, ballet, jazz dance and modern dance. She made her stage debut in To Kill a Mockingbird when she was 9 years old, and soon after she became a regular on her local stage. At 14, however, acting took a backseat to modeling after Sagemiller was scouted by Eileen Ford in a jewelry shop. She eventually left modeling to take an undergraduate degree in Art History at the University of Virginia.

Shortly after graduation, she decided to return to acting full-time, and studied at the Stella Adler Conservatory, New York University's Stonestreet Studio and at Michael Howard Studios. Sagemiller appeared in Movieline magazine in August 2001. In November 2001, Sagemiller appeared in Gear magazine. In early career, she starred on number of teen films, like Get Over It and Sorority Boys, and was lead actress in 2002 box office bomb thriller Soul Survivors.

On television, Sagemiller portrayed the character Michelle Ernhardt in the TNT series Raising the Bar from 2008 to 2009. After that series was cancelled, Sagemiller joined Law & Order: Special Victims Unit in a recurring role as ADA Gillian Hardwicke. She replaced Paula Patton when Patton departed the series after just one episode. Sagemiller was featured in ten episodes of the 12th season of SVU. She was replaced in the 13th season by Stephanie March and Diane Neal. In 2013, she was cast as female lead on Chicago Fire spinoff Chicago PD,but later left from show.
data.name: Melissa Sagemiller

data.biography:
Louis-José Houde (né le 19 octobre 1977 à Saint-Apollinaire) est un humoriste et acteur québécois, diplômé de l'École nationale de l'humour en 1998, dont la diction rapide et le ton de voix est instantanément reconnaissable.

Il a animé l'émission Ici Louis-José Houde à Radio-Canada, gagnante de deux Prix Gémeaux en 2006 pour la meilleure série humoristique et le meilleur texte d'émission humoristique avec François Avard. En 2009, il a joué un role principal avec Michel Côté dans le film De père en flic. En 2011, il a partagé la vedette avec Benoît Brière dans le film Le Sens de l'humour.

data.biography: Ellie Harvie (April 7, 1965, in Belleville, Canada) is a Canadian actress. She became known for her role as Morticia in The New Addams Family (1998–1999) and later played Dr. Lindsey Novak in Stargate SG-1 and Stargate Atlantis. Harvie started her career in theater and was part of the Vancouver TheatreSports group. She won the Just for Laughs Improv Tournament in Montreal in 1995 and received a Gemini Award nomination for her comedy work. In addition to her notable TV appearances, she starred in films such as The 6th Day (2000), Love Happens (2009), and Tooth Fairy (2010). She also had roles in Aurora Teagarden Mysteries (2015–2022) and Some Assembly Required (2014–2016). Harvie is active in the acting community and hosted the first UBCP/ACTRA Awards in 2012, honoring talents from British Columbia.
data.name: Ellie Harvie

data.biography:
Ellie Anne Harvie is een Canadese actrice die Morticia speelde in The New Addams Family. Deze rol werd oorspronkelijk gespeeld door de Amerikaanse actrice Carolyn Jones. Later speelde ze als Dr. Lindsey Novak in Stargate SG-1 en Stargate Atlantis.

Harvie was de jongste van vijf kinderen die in een familie van de Amerikaanse luchtmacht werden geboren. Ze vestigden zich uiteindelijk in Saskatchewan en Harvie ging later naar de Universiteit van Manitoba, waar ze een graad in politieke studies behaalde. Na haar afstuderen verhuisde Harvie in 1987 met haar gezin naar Vancouver, waar ze een tweejarige opleiding volgde aan de Vancouver Playhouse Theatre School.

Haar liefde voor stand-up comedy en improvisatie leidde tot extra werk in TheatreSports. Na een opleiding aan de Vancouver Playhouse Acting School, begon Harvie aan jarenlang theatertoerisme in de scholen van British Columbia met "Greenthumb Theatre", waar hij optrad in talloze Fringe Festivals en daarna op de grote podia.

Als onderdeel van het Vancouver TheatreSports-team won Harvie in 1995 het Just for Laughs Improv Tournament-kampioenschap dat in Montreal werd gehouden en versloeg hij concurrenten van over de hele wereld. Harvie verscheen ook in Cupid, The X-Files, Nightscream en The 6th Day. Ze ontving een gouden medaille op de Improv Olympics van CBC in 1998 en een Gemini-nominatie voor Best Comedy Performance in a Series of Special. Ze nam ook het roer over van Wendie Malick als Burdine Maxwell uit het tweede tv-seizoen van Bratz.

Op 24 november 2012 organiseerde Harvie de inaugurele UBCP / ACTRA Awards, die tot doel hebben acteertalent in British Columbia te eren.

Ellie Harvie (* 7. April 1965 in Belleville, Kanada) ist eine kanadische Schauspielerin. Sie wurde durch ihre Rolle als Morticia in The New Addams Family (1998–1999) bekannt und spielte später Dr. Lindsey Novak in Stargate SG-1 und Stargate Atlantis. Harvie begann ihre Karriere im Theater und war Teil der Vancouver TheatreSports-Gruppe. Sie gewann 1995 das Just for Laughs Improv-Turnier in Montreal und erhielt eine Gemini-Nominierung für ihre Comedy-Arbeit. Neben ihren bekannten Serienauftritten spielte sie in Filmen wie The 6th Day (2000), Love Happens (2009) und Tooth Fairy (2010). Sie übernahm auch Rollen in Aurora Teagarden Mysteries (2015–2022) und Some Assembly Required (2014–2016). Harvie engagiert sich für die Schauspielgemeinschaft und moderierte 2012 die ersten UBCP/ACTRA Awards, die Talente aus British Columbia ehren.

data.biography:
Stephanie Ann Hsu (/ˈʃuː/ SHOO: born November 25, 1990) is an American actress. She received critical acclaim for her dual roles as Joy Wang and Jobu Tupaki in the film Everything Everywhere All at Once (2022), earning her a nomination for the Academy Award for Best Supporting Actress.

Hsu trained at NYU Tisch School of the Arts and began her career in experimental theatre before starring on Broadway, originating the roles of Christine Canigula in Be More Chill (2015–2019) and Karen the Computer in SpongeBob SquarePants: The Broadway Musical (2016–2017). On television, she had recurring roles in the Hulu series The Path (2016–2018) and the Amazon Prime series The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel (2019–2023).

Description above from the Wikipedia article Stephanie Hsu, licensed under CC-BY-SA, full list of contributors on Wikipedia.
data.name: Stephanie Hsu

data.biography:
Stephanie Ann Hsu (* 25. November 1990 in Torrance, Kalifornien) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin.

Sie absolvierte eine Ausbildung an der NYU Tisch School of the Arts und begann ihre Karriere im experimentellen Theater, bevor sie am Broadway auftrat und die Rollen der Christine Canigula in Be More Chill (2015–2019) und Karen the Computer in SpongeBob SquarePants: The Broadway Musical (2016–2017) spielte. Im Fernsehen ist sie für ihre wiederkehrenden Rollen in The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel (2019–2023) und Awkwafina Is Nora from Queens (2020–2021) bekannt. Hsu erhielt viel Lob von Kritikern und eine Nominierung für den Oscar als beste Nebendarstellerin für ihre Doppelrolle als Joy Wang und Jobu Tupaki in dem Film Everything Everywhere All at Once (2022). Ihre Leistung brachte ihr auch Nominierungen für einen Golden Globe Award, einen SAG Award und einen Critics' Choice Movie Award ein.

Weitere bemerkenswerte Film- und Fernsehrollen sind Nebenrollen in The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel (2019), Set It Up (2018), Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings (2021), Poker Face (2023), Shortcomings (2023), American Born Chinese (2023), Joy Ride – The Trip (2023), The Monkey King (2023), Leo (2023) und The Fall Guy (2024).

data.biography:
Ray Baker (born July 9, 1948), sometimes credited as Raymond Baker, is an American theater, television and film actor. A longtime character actor, he has amassed over 100 screen credits.

Baker was born in Omaha, Nebraska and grew up in Denver, Colorado. He graduated from the University of Denver before moving to New York and living and working there for twenty years. Baker appeared on and off Broadway and in regional theatre. From 1982 - 1995, Baker was married to actress Patricia Richardson, with whom he has three children. He has been married to actress and playwright Colleen Dodson since 1997.
data.name: Ray Baker

data.overview: EuroTrip là một bộ phim hài hước của bộ đôi đạo diễn Jeff Schaffer và Alec Berg. Nội dung phim là câu chuyện của nhân vật chính là anh chàng Scott Thomas được một người bạn gốc Đức chỉ dẫn vượt qua kì thi môn tiếng Đức, sau kì thi người bạn đã rủ cậu ta đến du lịch châu Âu thăm nước Đức một chuyến, Scott Thomas rất nghi ngờ về điều đó vì cậu kia là con trai, tiếp theo Thomas cứ nghĩ cậu bạn của mình là một anh chàng gay chính tông đang lên kế hoạch làm thịt mình nên hơi lưỡng lự trước quyết định đi hay không trong phim Chuyến Du Lịch Châu Âu - EuroTrip (2004). Nhưng khi Thomas biết được người bạn đồng hành cùng họ là một cô gái xinh đẹp ngây ngất đã khiến cho cậu ta thay đổi suy nghĩ và quyết định đi ngay lập tức.
data.title: Chuyến Du Lịch Châu Âu

Perth Veerinsara Tangkitsuvanich, born in Bangkok, Thailand, is a model and actress under The One Enterprise (เดอะ วัน เอ็นเตอร์ไพรส์). She studied at Assumption Convent School in Bangkok before completing her final year of high school at Assumption Suka School. Afterwards, she went on to study in the management of cultural heritage and creative industries at Thammasat University's College of Innovation.

She first entered the entertainment industry in 2020 with a role in the series "Why R U?" (เพราะรักใช่เปล่า). After that, she signed as artist under channel One31 (ช่องวัน 31), a subsidiary of The One Enterprise.

data.biography: 陶泽如，著名影视演员，“全国五十位优秀电影表演艺术家”之一，国家一级演员。1953年12月7日生于江苏南京。1973年进入南京艺术学院戏剧系话剧表演专业学习。1977年任南京市话剧团演员。1983年开始从影，处女作为第五代导演轰动影坛的开山之作《一个和八个》，凭借此片脱颖而出，一举成名。之后主演了《陈赓蒙难》、《陈赓脱险》、《索伦河谷的枪声》、《最后一个冬日》、《晚钟》、《我的九月》、《米》、《红色恋人》等多部优秀影片。因主演吴子牛指导的电影《欢乐英雄》和《阴阳界》两片荣获第九届中国电影金鸡奖最佳男主角奖。他还主演了一批具有重要影响力的电视连续剧，如《武训》，《梦断情楼》，《黑洞》，《天网》，《生存之民工》等。在广大观众心中拥有很高声誉，深受好评。其中因《天网》获第16届优秀电视剧“飞天奖”最佳男主角奖。
data.name: 陶泽如

data.biography: 陶澤如，著名影視演員，“全國五十位優秀電影表演藝術家”之一，國家一級演員。1953 年 12 月 7 日生於江蘇南京。1973 年進入南京藝術學院戲劇系話劇表演專業學習。1977 年任南京市話劇團演員。1983 年開始從影，處女作為第五代導演轟動影壇的開山之作《一個和八個》，憑藉此片脱穎而出，一舉成名。之後主演了《陳賡蒙難》、《陳賡脱險》、《索倫河谷的槍聲》、《最後一個冬日》、《晚鐘》、《我的九月》、《米》、《紅色戀人》等多部優秀影片。因主演吳子牛指導的電影《歡樂英雄》和《陰陽界》兩片榮獲第九屆中國電影金雞獎最佳男主角獎。他還主演了一批具有重要影響力的電視聯續劇，如《武訓》，《夢斷情樓》，《黑洞》，《天網》，《生存之民工》等。在廣大觀眾心中擁有很高聲譽，深受好評。其中因《天網》獲第 16 屆優秀電視劇“飛天獎”最佳男主角獎。
data.name: 陶澤如

Zunächst als Vaudeville- und Burlesque-Künstler unterwegs, trat Gus Schilling zwischen 1928 und 1931 unter anderem dreimal am New Yorker Broadway auf, ehe er sich Orson Welles’ Mercury Theatre anschloss und in mehreren Radiohörspielen zum Einsatz kam. Ab 1940 wirkte er schließlich auch in US-amerikanischen Filmen mit und war dabei zumeist in komischen Nebenrollen zu sehen, wie beispielsweise in den Filmmusicals In der Hölle ist der Teufel los! (1941) und Du warst nie berückender (1942), wo er neben Fred Astaire und Rita Hayworth den Sekretär von Adolphe Menjou spielte. Er trat aber auch in insgesamt fünf Filmen von Orson Welles auf: Citizen Kane (1941), Der Glanz des Hauses Amberson (1942), Die Lady von Shanghai (1947), Macbeth – Der Königsmörder (1948) und Im Zeichen des Bösen (1958). Letzterer wurde erst nach Schillings Tod veröffentlicht.

Schilling war mit der Burlesque-Künstlerin Betty Rowland verheiratet. Die Ehe endete jedoch in Scheidung. Schilling, der ein starker Raucher gewesen war, starb 1957 vier Tage vor seinem 49. Geburtstag in seinem Apartment in Hollywood an einem Herzinfarkt.

August "Gus" Schilling (June 20, 1908 - June 16, 1957) was an American actor.

August "Gus" Schilling (June 20, 1908 – June 16, 1957) was an American film actor who started in burlesque comedy and usually played nervous comic roles, often unbilled. A friend of Orson Welles, he appeared in five of the director's films — Citizen Kane (first screen performance), The Magnificent Ambersons, The Lady from Shanghai, Macbeth and Touch of Evil (final performance, released posthumously).

Born in New York City, Schilling had a rubber face and flustered gestures which made him a natural comedian and he began his career understudying comedy stars Bert Lahr and Joe Penner on Broadway. He soon became a favorite among burlesque comedians, who welcomed him into the burlesque profession. Schilling was in a relationship with burlesque star Betty Rowland and the couple toured in the Minsky burlesque troupe.

Orson Welles saw Schilling in New York and followed him to Florida. There Welles hired Schilling to appear in a stage production featuring several Shakespearean scenes. "I learned my part by taking the script to Welles and having him translate the lines to everyday English," Schilling recalled in 1939. Welles promised Schilling a part in Welles's first motion picture, and kept his promise: Schilling is featured in Citizen Kane (1941). This established Schilling in Hollywood movies as a "nervous" comedian (he plays a jittery symphony conductor in Olsen and Johnson's Hellzapoppin', for example). He also co-starred with character comedian Richard Lane in a series of 11 comedy shorts for Columbia Pictures; the series ran from 1945 to 1950.
data.name: Gus Schilling

data.biography:
Stephen Lord (born 1 October 1972) is a British actor probably best known for playing Jase Dyer, in BBC soap opera EastEnders between 2007-2008  and Dominic Meak in the Channel 4 comedy drama series, Shameless, between 2012 and 2013. In 2021, he was cast in the ITV soap opera Coronation Street. Lord was raised in Langworthy, Salford

The BBC defended the use of violent scenes in an edition of EastEnders. In the episode, Lord's character Jase Dyer was seen losing his life following a confrontation with a group of gangsters who stabbed him after brutally beating him up. Later, the character's dead body was seen by viewers in hospital scenes which featured Jase's son Jay Brown, played by Jamie Borthwick. Lord appeared in the BBC drama series Casualty in 2010–11 playing the abusive husband of nurse Kirsty Clements (played by Lucy Gaskell) in an ongoing storyline dealing with domestic violence. In 2021, Lord was cast in the ITV soap opera Coronation Street as Tez Wyatt.

Lord portrayed Danny Nolan in the film Strangeways Here We Come.
data.name: Stephen Lord

​From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Christopher Britton, sometimes credited as "Chris Britton," is a Canadian-born film actor, television actor, Stage Actor, and voice actor who is probably best known for his work in X-Men: The Animated Series, in which he was the voice of Mister Sinister. More recently, he has voiced the character of Soichiro Yagami in the English dub of the anime series Death Note and its live action counterpart. He also was the narrator on the Dino Crisis II videogame created by Capcom in 2000. He has a regular role as Richard Norton in Da Vinci's Inquest/City Hall, and has acted in several different movies from The Day After Tomorrow to Godsend. He has worked on many different plays and theater productions, including two seasons with the Stratford and Shaw Festivals, and has acted throughout Ontario, Vancouver, and the United States.

data.biography: Christian Serratos (born September 21, 1990) is an American actress. Born and raised in Southern California, Christian knew from an early age that she wanted to be an actress. As a toddler, she was already a compulsive performer. She would entertain her family nightly by re-enacting television shows. Christian put all that passion into dance and studied ballet along with ice-skating. Christian competed frequently in ice-skating competitions. She enjoyed dance and ice-skating so much that she decided to study multiple dance styles. Christian started as a Ford model. Later, she landed the role of "Suzie Crabgrass" on Nickelodeon's "Ned's Declassified School Survival Guide" (2004) then Cow Belles (2006) (TV). More of Christian's credits include "7th Heaven" (1996), "Hannah Montana" (2006) and "Zoey 101" (2005).
data.name: Christian Serratos

data.biography: 克里斯蒂安·塞拉托斯（Christian Serratos，1990年9月21日-），美国女演员。克里斯蒂安在南加州出生和长大，从小就知道自己想成为一名演员。作为一个蹒跚学步的孩子，她已经是一个强迫性的表演者。她每晚都会通过重演电视节目来娱乐她的家人。克里斯蒂安把所有的热情都投入到舞蹈中，并在滑冰的同时学习芭蕾舞。克里斯蒂安经常参加滑冰比赛。她非常喜欢舞蹈和滑冰，以至于她决定学习多种舞蹈风格。克里斯蒂安最初是福特的模特。后来，她在尼克国际儿童频道的“内德解密学校生存指南”（2004 年）和 Cow Belles （2006） （电视）中扮演了“Suzie Crabgrass”的角色。克里斯蒂安的更多作品包括“第七天堂”（1996 年）、“汉娜蒙大拿”（2006 年）和“佐伊 101”（2005 年）。
data.name: 克里斯蒂安·塞拉托斯

data.biography:
Christian Marie Serratos, 21 Eylül 1990 tarihinde Pasadena, Kaliforniya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Meksika ve İtalyan kökenli bir aileden gelen Serratos, kariyerine genç yaşta başladı. Başlangıçta rekabetçi bir buz patencisi olan Serratos, daha sonra Ford Modelleme Ajansı ile anlaşarak modellik yapmaya başladı. Oyunculuk kariyerine attığı ilk önemli adım, Nickelodeon'ın popüler gençlik dizisi "Ned's Declassified School Survival Guide"da (2004-2007) canlandırdığı Suzie Crabgrass karakteriyle oldu ve bu rolle genç izleyiciler arasında tanındı.

Ancak sinema dünyasında geniş kitlelerce tanınmasını sağlayan rolü, Stephenie Meyer'in çok satan romanlarından uyarlanan "Alacakaranlık" (Twilight) serisinde (2008-2012) canlandırdığı Angela Weber karakteri oldu. Filmlerde Bella Swan'ın nazik ve sadık arkadaşlarından birini oynayan Serratos, serinin küresel başarısı sayesinde uluslararası alanda dikkat çekti ve kariyerinde önemli bir basamak atladı.

Serratos, kariyerindeki bir diğer önemli adımı AMC'nin fenomen dizisi "The Walking Dead"e (2014-2022) katılarak attı. Diziye dördüncü sezonda Rosita Espinosa karakteriyle dahil oldu. Başlangıçta yardımcı bir karakter olan Rosita, Serratos'un performansıyla yıllar içinde dizinin en cesur, yetenekli ve dayanıklı savaşçılarından birine dönüştü. Karakterin dizinin finalindeki trajik ve kahramanca vedası, izleyiciler üzerinde derin bir etki bıraktı ve Rosita, serinin en sevilen figürlerinden biri olarak anıldı.

"The Walking Dead"deki rolü devam ederken, Serratos kariyerinin en büyük projelerinden birini üstlenerek Netflix yapımı "Selena: The Series" (2020-2021) dizisinin başrolü oldu. Bu biyografik dizide, efsanevi Tejano müziği sanatçısı Selena Quintanilla'yı canlandırdı. Bu zorlu rol için hem eleştirmenlerden hem de izleyicilerden beğeni toplayan Serratos, başrol oyuncusu olarak yeteneğini ve çok yönlülüğünü kanıtlayarak kariyerinde yeni bir sayfa açtı.

克里斯蒂·塞拉託斯（克里斯蒂·瑟拉圖斯，1990 年 9 月 21 日-），美國女演員。克里斯蒂在南加州出生和長大，從小就知道自己想成為一名演員。作為一個蹣跚學步的孩子，她已經是一個強迫性的表演者。她每晚都會通過重演電視節目來娛樂她的家人。克里斯蒂把所有的熱情都投入到舞蹈中，並在滑冰的同時學習芭蕾舞。克里斯蒂經常參加滑冰比賽。她非常喜歡舞蹈和滑冰，以至於她決定學習多種舞蹈風格。克里斯蒂最初是福特的模特。後來，她在尼克國際兒童頻道的“內德解密學校生存指南”（2004 年）和 Cow Belles （2006） （電視）中扮演了“Suzie Crabgrass”的角色。克里斯蒂的更多作品包括“第七天堂”（1996 年）、“漢娜蒙大拿”（2006 年）和“佐伊 101”（2005 年）。
data.name: 克里斯蒂·瑟拉圖斯
